1.0.0.en: First version! Monitor battery level, charging status, location, vehicle state, and control charging and climatization from Homey flows.
1.0.0.nl: Eerste versie! Monitor accuniveau, laadstatus, locatie, voertuigstatus, en bedien laden en klimaatregeling vanuit Homey-flows.

1.0.3.en: Added error handling for login screen

1.0.4.en: Fixed an issue which prevented user from adding the device

1.0.5.en: Added S-PIN support for vehicle lock/unlock with new security settings and Flow action cards. Implemented lock/unlock API integration and device capability handling with clear error messages when S-PIN is missing. Added reverse geocoding to resolve parking GPS coordinates to a readable address. Enabled Insights for mileage, range, charging power, and remaining charge time, and allowed these to be used as device status indicators. Fixed mileage extraction from vehicle status API. Improved widget stability by preventing crashes during app startup. Increased device icon stroke width for better visibility. Updated documentation (README, README.txt, README.nl.txt) with S-PIN setup, lock/unlock features, parking address, and insights information.

1.0.6.en: Fixed mileage retrieval by adding maintenance and health API endpoints and implementing a new mileage extraction method with validation, replacing the incorrect status-based mileage logic so mileage now updates correctly on the next poll. Improved app stability by preventing initialization crashes: flow card registrations are now wrapped in try/catch blocks and widget API calls use defensive error handling so the widget returns a user-friendly “App is still loading” message instead of failing when the app is not yet ready.

1.0.7.en: Fixed widget “App not ready” issue by moving the widget entry point to the correct Homey SDK location (widgets/<id>/public/index.html), updating icon paths, and removing the incorrectly placed index.html. Added defensive try/catch handling around flow card registrations to prevent app initialization crashes. Introduced a minimal reference “Vehicle Status” widget to validate widget functionality and added troubleshooting guidance to the READMEs, which were updated to document both widgets and include a tip to restart the MyŠkoda app if it does not appear when adding a device.

1.0.8.en: Fixed device status indicators by renaming capabilities to Homey-compatible prefixes (meter_ and measure_) so mileage, range, remaining charge time, and charging power can be used as tile indicators. Clarified that lock/unlock and doors-open states are independent vehicle signals. Completely redesigned the widget into a modern dashboard with animated battery gauge, charging indicators, status cards, hero stats, and full light/dark mode support. Verified complete English and Dutch translations across capabilities, flows, widgets, and locales. Updated all READMEs with device status indicator documentation, lock vs. doors explanation, and a note that devices must be re-added after the capability rename.

1.0.9.en: Improved App Store compliance by simplifying README.txt and README.nl.txt (removed duplicated descriptions, flow card listings, obsolete widget references, and re-add device notes). Updated the app description tagline to Your Škoda, always within reach. Je Škoda, altijd binnen handbereik. Replaced the driver icon with a clean line-art car icon that follows Homey design guidelines for canvas size and stroke width. Fixed the vehicle widget device selection by simplifying the capability filter and adding automatic capability migration so existing devices update without needing to be re-added. Removed the unused status widget and updated README.md to reflect the single remaining widget and remove outdated sections.

1.0.10.en: Fix vehicle lock detection: normalize overall.locked to uppercase and accept YES or LOCKED (API v2 returns YES/NO), ensuring correct locked and doorsLocked state detection.

1.0.11.en: Fix driver icon, remove connection status elements, convert status cards to 2-column grid, improve spacing/footer layout, and update widget preview
